title: Update Data Retention Policy: Transaction Log Retention from 5 to 7 Years
description: During the Q2 2027 compliance audit, auditors identified that the current Data Retention Policy states transaction_log records must be retained for 5 years. Per audit recommendation #AR-221, this retention period must be extended to 7 years to align with updated regulatory requirements. Please update the relevant knowledge base article accordingly.

title: Quarterly Access Review for Finance Systems
description: Conduct quarterly access review for JD Edwards and SAP finance modules. Remove stale accounts and document exceptions.

title: Firewall Rule Exception for New Analytics Server
description: Request temporary firewall rule to allow outbound HTTPS from analytics-prod-02 to api.external-vendor.com for integration testing. Need approval and 30-day expiration.
